ORDER TO PAYOUT MONEY
PETITION FOR FORFEITURE IN REM
DECLARATION OF PAMELA A. UNDERWOOD FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIF (FOREFEITURE)
AMENDED PETITION FOR FORFEITURE IN REM
DISCOVERY 612, NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. PETITIONER PEOPLE'S MOTION FOR ORDER STRIKING CLAIM IS GRANTED. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT
ORDER STRIKING THE CLAIM OF HOWARD RUDD

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: JUDGMENT OF FORFEITURE AND DISPOSITION PURSUANT TO STIPULATION. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $334.00 BE RELEASED TO ATTORNEY V ROY LEFCOURT ON BEHALF OF CLAIMANT JAQUAIN YOUNG. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $70.00 BE RELEASED TO ATTORNEY V ROY LEFCOURT ON BEHALF OF CLAIMANT MAURICE NORTHCUTT. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $334.00 PLUS INTEREST SINCE DATE OF DEPOSIT IS HEREBY DECLARED FORFEITED PURSUANT TO H&S 11470 ET SEQ AND DISPOSED OF AS PROVIDED BY H&S 11489. ANY RIGHTS TO APPEAL OR FURTHER LITIGATION CONCERNING THE SEIZURE OR RESOLUTION OF THIS FORFEITURE IS MUTUALLY WAIVED BY BOTH PARTIES. PARTIES SHALL BEAR THEIR COSTS OF SUIT AND ATTORNEY FEES. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Striking Claim

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Answers To Petitioner'S First Set Of Demand For Production And Inspection Of Documents; Petitioner'S First Set Of Special Interrogatories; Judicial Council Form Interrogatories
Off Calendar Jun-12-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Petitioner PEOPLE's Motion To Compel Answers To Petitioner's First Set Of Demand For Production and Inspection Of Documents, First Set Of Special Interrogatories, and Judicial Council Form Interrogatories is granted. No opposition has been filed. Claimants are ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Answers To Petitioner'S First Set Of Demand For Production And Inspection Of Documents; Petitioner'S First Set Of Special Interrogatories; Judicial Council Form Interrogatories

MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Petitioner People's Motion To Compel Answers To Petitioner's First Set Of Demand For Production and Inspection Of Documents, First Set Of Special Interrogatories, and Judicial Council Form Interrogatories is ordered continued to June 12, 2006 at 9 a.m. on the court's own motion.
